releases.label: DR1
releases.summary: First PS1 3pi survey release — static-sky (mean and stacked) grizy photometry over three quarters of the sky (dec > -30)

releases.label: DR2
releases.summary: Current PS1 release — adds single-epoch (time-domain) detections to the DR1 static-sky catalogs; grizy photometry of ~3 billion sources (26 billion detections) over the 3pi survey footprint (dec > -30). Still the latest PS1 release as of 2026.
